heading: Findings
label: 5301 Findings
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–425, § 1104 Stat. 915Oct. 15, 1990“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Department of Energy Metal Casting Competitiveness Research Act of 1990’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–425, § 1104 Stat. 915Oct. 15, 1990“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Department of Energy Metal Casting Competitiveness Research Act of 1990’.”

children.text: metal casting is an important process for manufacturing many items imported into or exported from the United States;
the encouragement and maintenance of a technically advanced United States metal casting industry is essential to the competitiveness of many American industries;
maintaining a viable metal casting industry is vital to the national security and economic well being of the United States;
the promotion of technology competitiveness and energy efficiency in the United States metal casting industry by the Federal Government is necessary to maintain a viable metal casting industry;
many metal casting companies lack the resources to conduct metal casting research alone, placing them at a serious competitive disadvantage;
the support of university-based research in metal casting is important in promoting technology development and providing industry with qualified engineers; and

by combining the resources of the Federal Government, universities, industry, and private organizations, to conduct research and development activities, substantial technological benefits will result to the metal casting industry.
